nodes.name: 红鹳科
nodes.summary: 红鹳科（Phoenicopteridae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如秘鲁红鹳、智利火烈鳥、大红鹳等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: 小红鹳
nodes.summary: 小红鹳（Lesser flamingo，学名 Phoeniconaias minor），分类上属于红鹳目，并归入红鹳科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括污染。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: 红鹳目
nodes.summary: 红鹳目（Phoenicopteriformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如秘鲁红鹳、智利火烈鳥、大红鹳等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联210种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等210种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |title=Save the Flamingo|url= http://www.savetheflamingo.co.za/|access-date = 2008-08-20}} The population in the two key East African lakes, Lake Nakuru and Lake Bogoria, have been adversely affected in recent years by suspected heavy metal poisoning, while its primary African breeding area in Lake Natron is currently under threat by a proposed soda ash plant by Tata Chemicals. The only breeding site in South Africa, situated at Kamfers Dam, is threatened by pollution and encroaching development.{{cite news |last = Macleod|first = F
